idea.title: Tile Trio
idea.hook: A heap of overlapping picture-tiles — tap a tile to send it to your tray; three of a kind pop and vanish. Clear the whole pile before your 7-slot tray jams.
idea.hook_ru: Куча налегающих друг на друга плиток с картинками — жми плитку, она уходит в лоток; три одинаковые исчезают. Разбери всю кучу, пока лоток из 7 ячеек не застрял.
idea.prototype: Layered heap where only un-covered (top) tiles are tappable. Tapping a tile moves it into a 7-slot tray. Three identical tiles in the tray auto-clear (pop + sparkle) and free slots. WIN = board fully cleared; LOSE = tray fills to 7 with no possible match. Tap-only (no drag). Level-based escalation: more tile kinds, more layers, and from ~level 4 locked/chained tiles needing an adjacent clear first. Limited undo + limited shuffle boosters.
idea.why_novel: first tap-tray triple-match in our portfolio (we have ball/water sort but no tile-tray match)
idea.non_timer_pressure: 7-slot tray jam (resource scarcity, no countdown timer)

sources.title: Сортируй Плитки: Тапай и Играй
sources.snippet: Trending tap-to-sort tile puzzle on Yandex casual chart 2026-05-29

sources.title: puzzle_objects (weight 18241, dominant)
sources.snippet: large tactile puzzle objects, clear color groups, one obvious almost-solved state

synthesizer_brief: Outside-in SIGNAL pick targeting the dominant puzzle_objects CTR archetype (5x the next portal weight) plus the trending Yandex casual triple-tile/tap-to-sort mechanic. Borrows the proven ball/water-sort resource-scarcity loop but maps it onto a tap-tray triple-match — a genre we had no entry in. Non-timer pressure is the 7-slot tray jam; escalation via kinds/layers/locked tiles; limited undo + shuffle keep failure forgiving. Cover/icon imitate the puzzle_objects composition: a glossy colourful heap of chunky picture-tiles, top-down, one obvious triple about to pop, no text (Yandex 5.6).

alternatives.status: not built today — already shipped as bolt_out
